title: 2JTJ
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the droid used by [[Tahl]]|the [[2JTJ personal navigation droid|generic model]] or [[R5-2JE|the R5 unit also referred as "TooJay"]]}} {{Droid |type= |image= |name=2JTJ |homeworld=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Genetech Corporation]] |line= |model=[[2JTJ personal navigation droid]] |class=[[2JTJ personal navigation droid|Navigation droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=1.7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |gender= |pronouns=She/her''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' |sensor=Blue |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] **[[Tahl]] }} {{Quote|Get lost! I'm in a hurry!''"
"''I cannot get lost, sir. I'm a navigation droid.|Tahl and 2JTJ|}} '''2JTJ''', usually referred to as '''TooJay''', was a [[2JTJ personal navigation droid|navigation droid]] provided by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Tahl]] after she was blinded on [[Melida/Daan/Legends|Melida/Daan]]. 2JTJ helped her with her new life, providing assistance so that she could start getting used to her new condition. However, the failed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] installed an audio and video spying device inside the droid in order to track [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and Tahl's investigations. When they discovered the trick, they prepared a trap for Xanatos. In the end, 2JTJ continued serving Tahl. {{Droid-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' *''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: Deceptions]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=2JTJ |fi=2JTJ }} [[Category:2JTJ personal navigation droids]] [[Category:Droids of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Droids with she/her pronouns]]
